title: Abundant. Forever. As I Am.
subtitle: An affirmation for closing the 84-day arc and naming abundance as a permanent fact, not a practice to maintain
excerpt: A brief affirmation from the Day 84 theme of a 12-week money programme. Three words that do not qualify, condition, or strive. The statement names what the 84 days have built: an identity that stays.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 84 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448).

content.text: A brief affirmation from the Day 84 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 84: anchor abundance as who I am forever. The statement is three words because that is all that is left when striving stops.
Say it three times, hand on heart. Pause between each repetition. Let each word land fully before moving on.
Adapted from the Day 84 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
